calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Timothy Patrick Sanocki.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Kristen Sleezer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Timothy Patrick Sanocki.
Plaintiff's first amended complaint for collections/open book account was filed on April 17, 2017, and personally served on defendant Timothy Patrick Sanocki on May 26, 2017.
Default as to defendant Timothy Patrick Sanocki was entered on March 5, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 5, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 9, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant, Timothy Patrick Sanocki, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,890.98.
Costs - $970.06.
Total - $32,861.04.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
